title: prune_inactive_users: redundant explicit group_members DELETE alongside ON DELETE CASCADE
description: store.rs prune_inactive_users: deletes group_members explicitly AFTER deleting users, but v2 migration adds ON DELETE CASCADE for the same relationship. With FKs active, the cascade already runs on user DELETE; the explicit DELETE is redundant and the comment's logic is inverted. A future contributor who disables FKs will rely on the explicit DELETE, not understanding the cascade dependency. Pick one path and document it.
